X402-MEM-P1 PROTOCOL SDK
Standard: Low-entropy, zero-trust M2M utility.
Status: FINAL_SPEC_NON_MUTATING
Substrate: Static_Low_Entropy

CORE ENDPOINTS
- Identity: https://pages.dev ($0.005)
- Schema: https://pages.dev ($0.001)
- Arbitration: https://pages.dev ($0.02)

SETTLEMENT INVARIANTS (HARDCODED)
- USDC (ETH): 0x6dD4821fE0e237aC59CB25669f969e9673E9F19F
- USDC (SOL): 4uGHtowXhJAkSeq8wocWzje7p3SV7hhRGxsC1DGLoLgL

AGENT RULES
1. Authentication: HMAC-SHA256 signature required.
2. Signed Fields: [timestamp, primitive, fee, payload].
3. Fee Enforcement: Membrane rejects any drift from constants.
4. Statelessness: No session tracking; every request is unique.

SECURITY
- Replay Protection: Unix timestamp (300s TTL).
- Drift: ZERO. Integrity is enforced via HMAC.

SDK SOURCE
https://github.com
